nasb.text: You have planted them, they have also taken root; They grow, they have even produced fruit. You are near to their lips But far from their mind.

esv.text: You plant them, and they take root; they grow and produce fruit; you are near in their mouth and far from their heart.

cnv.text: 你栽種了他們，他們也扎了根， 並且長大，結出果實； 他們的口中有你， 心裡卻沒有你。

ccb.text: 你栽培他们，让他们生根长大， 结出果实。 他们嘴上尊崇你， 心却远离你。
